title: limonium spathulatum
intro: Limonium spathulatum, also known as sea lavender or coastal sea lavender, is a perennial succulent plant native to the coastal areas of California in the United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Limonium spathulatum include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in skincare products and herbal supplements.
